stemHtml: An aeroplane has a C<sub>L</sub> (lift coefficient) of 0.6 and a C<sub>DI</sub> (induced drag coefficient) value of 0.1 in level flight. The aeroplane slows down while maintaining level flight. The lift coefficient increased by a factor of 1.5 to maintain lift at the lower speed. If there is NO change in configuration, what is the new C<sub>DI</sub>?
